scripts.web-gemini:review: corepack pnpm run build:shared && node scripts/web-gemini-review-edge.mjs
scripts.web-gemini:review:diagnose: corepack pnpm run build:shared && node scripts/web-gemini-review-edge.mjs --cdp-diagnose-only
scripts.web-gemini:review:execute: corepack pnpm run build:shared && node scripts/web-gemini-review-edge.mjs --execute
scripts.web-gemini:review:test: corepack pnpm run build:shared && node scripts/web-gemini-review-script-test.mjs
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run web-gemini:review:test && corepack pnpm run scenario:agent
scripts.type-check: corepack pnpm run build:shared && corepack pnpm --filter backend type-check && corepack pnpm --filter client type-check && corepack pnpm --filter @zev2/agent-runner type-check
